RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0010 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Ivan Brown Date of Birth: 20/09/2002 SSN (tokenized): TKN-137473 Annual Income: $158,000 Loan Amount: $48,000 Branch: Dublin Employment: [x] Full-time [ ] Self-employed Housing: [ ] Own [ ] Rent Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN87348AL Nissan Leaf 2016 ICE Used 55,000 VIN24319AL Nissan Sportage 2017 EV New 26,000 Authorized Signature: Ivan Brown
